ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content item */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content item */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the content item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content item */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., podcast, e-book, video course) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the content in minutes */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* File size of the content in bytes */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the content */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average user rating of the content */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the content's thumbnail image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item being downloaded */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the download (e.g., July, June) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the download */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the content item in the given month */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform from which the content was downloaded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country from which the download occurred */,
  "user_device" TEXT /* Type of device used for the download */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_downloads_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES content_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, publisher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_content_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the content */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the content was accessed in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_content_access_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES content_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_content_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of the tag (e.g., topic, author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_item_tags" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the content item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_item_categories" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category associated with the content item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item being analyzed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the analytics event */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric being tracked (e.g., downloads, views) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES content_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_publisher_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher associated with the content item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id", "publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES content_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_party_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the third-party platform */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date of the last synchronization with the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)
